theme: 2026 H2 planning: Your company event window is closing

linkedin.text:
If you're planning a company event for Q3–Q4 2026, I need you to read this.

Hotel availability in Europe starts closing 14–16 weeks out.
Flights go up 20–35% after the 12-week mark.
Local vendors get booked by other event companies weeks in advance.

We're now at the point where September and October dates in popular destinations — Barcelona, Prague, Lisbon, Budapest — are filling fast.

Here's what I'm seeing in our current booking pipeline:

→ September in Athens: 70% of recommended hotels already have group blocks
→ October in Prague: Two of the best castle venues already gone
→ Rhodes in late summer: Limited catamaran capacity remaining

If your 2026 event is still on a whiteboard, now is the time to get it off.

I'm not saying this to create urgency. I'm saying this because I've watched companies lose their first-choice destinations and settle for their third.

We do a free 30-minute planning call. No commitment.

You walk away knowing:
✓ What your budget actually buys in each destination
✓ Which dates are still realistic
✓ What your timeline looks like

Book the call. It costs nothing to know.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#EventPlanning #CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #2026Events #HRPlanning #UproductionEvents #MICE #EuropeEvents
